creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
It looks like gnome-online-accounts is also missing:

:: src/main.js

pkg.require({ 'cairo': '1.0',
              'Champlain': '0.12',
              'Clutter': '1.0',
              'Cogl': '1.0',
              'GeocodeGlib': '1.0',
              'Gdk': '3.0',
              'GdkPixbuf': '2.0',
              'GFBGraph': '0.2',
              'Gio': '2.0',
              'GLib': '2.0',
              'Goa': '1.0',
              'GObject': '2.0',
              'Gtk': '3.0',
              'GtkChamplain': '0.12',
              'GtkClutter': '1.0',
              'Rest': '0.7',
              'Soup': '2.4' });
